Move(double, double, double)

Move the vector by adding a shift value to each component.

virtual void Move(double dx, double dy, double dz)

dx double

Sample Snippet

Normalize()

Normalize the vector (scale it to magnitude = 1).

virtual void Normalize()

Examples

Sample Snippet

PolarMove(double, double, double)

Modify the vector by adding to its polar components. Angles are in radians.

virtual void PolarMove(double dAzimuth, double dInclination, double dRadius)

Parameters

dAzimuth double
dInclination double
dRadius double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PolarQuery(out double, out double, out double)

Get the vector's polar components. Angles are in radians.

virtual void PolarQuery(out double Azimuth, out double Inclination, out double radiusLength)

Parameters

Azimuth double
Inclination double
radiusLength double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PolarSet(double, double, double)

Set the vector using polar components. Angles are in radians.

virtual void PolarSet(double Azimuth, double Inclination, double radiusLength)

Parameters

Azimuth double
Inclination double
radiusLength double

Sample Snippet

virtual void QueryComponents(out double dx, out double dy, out double dz)

Parameters

dx double
dy double
dz double
